title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
posterAlt: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor (2013) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Orbiting a quiet backwater planet, the massed forces of the universe's deadliest species gather, drawn to a mysterious message that echoes out to the stars. And amongst them, the Doctor. Rescuing Clara from a family Christmas dinner, the Time Lord and his best friend must learn what this enigmatic signal means for his own fate and that of the universe.
synopsis: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor (2013) is a drama and science fiction film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on TMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
